title: CraftMind Studio — Creative Brief
description: Input format for the Director AI to generate shot lists. Defines story, characters, mood, and production constraints.

premise.description: Core story idea or logline. Should be vivid and specific.
examples: Alex discovers an abandoned village at sunset. Strange sounds echo from the well at the center of town.

characters.description: Character IDs involved in the story. Must match registered CharacterProfile IDs.

mood.description: Overall emotional tone of the production.

setting.description: Optional location/world description for world-building context.
examples: Dense jungle biome at golden hour

genre.description: Optional genre tag for style guidance.

notes.description: Additional director's notes or specific requests.

examples.premise: Alex discovers an abandoned village at sunset. Strange sounds echo from the well at the center of town.
examples.setting: Plains biome, abandoned village, golden hour lighting
examples.notes: Use lots of crane and dolly shots. Save the reveal for the midpoint.
